practice.name: Smile Dental Care
practice.address: 9550 Dix Ave Suite D, Dearborn, MI 48120

highlights.name: Chantyl
highlights.quote: Since day one, my experience has been amazing. The entire team is kind, caring, and always makes me feel comfortable.

highlights.name: Deena
highlights.quote: Super friendly and kept me comfortable the whole time. There was absolutely no pain at all. I definitely recommend them.

highlights.name: Badr A.
highlights.quote: I've been coming here for 7 years. My loyalty to Dr. Bassam Ali and his team continues because of the care they give every day.

highlights.name: Haeder A.
highlights.quote: This is by far the best dental office I have ever visited. The staff are polite, respectful, and extremely helpful.

homepage.heroHeadline: Your family deserves a healthier, brighter smile.
homepage.heroBody: Gentle, professional dental care for patients of all ages, right here on Dix Avenue in Dearborn.

services.title: Preventive Care
services.summary: Cleanings, exams, and preventive care to keep your smile healthy.

services.title: Restorative Care
services.summary: Fillings and restorative care focused on comfort and lasting results.

services.title: Cosmetic Care
services.summary: Smile improvements tailored to how you want to look and feel.

services.title: Family Dentistry
services.summary: Care for every age in a calm, welcoming office.

services.title: Consultations
services.summary: Ask questions, share your goals, and get a clear next step.

services.title: Ongoing Care
services.summary: Follow-up and guidance so your smile stays healthy over time.

careFeatures.title: Clear explanations. Calm visits.
careFeatures.body: We take time to listen, answer your questions, and explain every step so you feel comfortable from the moment you arrive.
careFeatures.imageAlt: Smile Dental Care team inside the Dearborn clinic

careFeatures.title: One team for your whole family.
careFeatures.body: From first visits to long-term care, our Dix Avenue team is here to make dental care simple, welcoming, and reliable.
careFeatures.imageAlt: Smile Dental Care team outside the clinic building

benefits.title: Kind, welcoming staff
benefits.body: Patients often mention our friendly team, from the front desk to the treatment room.

benefits.title: Clear explanations
benefits.body: We explain your options in plain language so you can make confident decisions.

benefits.title: Gentle, comfortable care
benefits.body: Many patients tell us they feel at ease and experience little to no discomfort.

benefits.title: Easy to get started
benefits.body: Call us to ask a question or schedule your visit. New patients are welcome.

services.title: Dental care for every need.
services.body: From routine cleanings to smile improvements, we help you find the right next step.

whyUs.title: Dentistry built on trust and care.

reviews.title: Trusted by Dearborn families.
reviews.body: Real reviews from real patients: kind staff, clear care, and visits people come back for.

team.title: Care from people you can trust.
team.body: Led by Dr. Bassam Ali, our Dearborn team is known for being kind, clear, and thorough.

teamStory.title: One team. One warm welcome.
teamStory.body: From the front desk to the treatment room, we make every visit clear, comfortable, and cared for.

cta.title: Your healthier smile starts with a call.
cta.body: Have a question or ready to schedule? Our Dearborn team is here to help.

visit.title: Convenient care on Dix Avenue.
visit.body: Located at 9550 Dix Ave Suite D. Call for directions, hours, or to book your appointment.
